table_work.thesis: Perps in Infinex are no longer one venue. Synthetix joins Hyperliquid, and the choice of venue becomes part of the account, not a separate destination.
table_work.obstacle: Reader expects a launch announcement with breathless leverage numbers and 'now live' framing. Reader also assumes one perps venue per app.
table_work.reader_prior: Infinex has perps via Hyperliquid. Synthetix is a known DeFi perps name they associate with its own app, not Infinex.
table_work.lining: Surface: a structural fact about the platform. Underneath: the banker's quiet placement — the better way already exists here, take it or don't.
table_work.not_the_point: Race language between Synthetix and Hyperliquid. Leverage-as-feature. 'Now live' urgency. CLOB-vs-AMM mechanics debate.

x.physical_score: Set the fact down with weight and a direct line. No flourish, no hedge. The sentence has somewhere to be.
x.micro_objective: to seat Synthetix next to Hyperliquid
x.obstacle_local: Reader expects a launch frame; I refuse the frame.
x.shadow_move: A flicker of pride in the placement that I do not let surface.

x.physical_score: Slide into the consequence: more markets, one account. Light and direct, no force.
x.micro_objective: to let the reader feel the room get larger
x.obstacle_local: Tempting to list features; I keep the gesture spatial.

web.physical_score: One declarative surface. Strong, direct, sustained. The fact is the gesture.
web.micro_objective: to seat Synthetix in the platform as structure
web.obstacle_local: Compression pulls toward slogan; I keep it stated, not sold.

in-product.physical_score: Quiet, light, direct UI surface — the kind of label that doesn't lean.
in-product.micro_objective: to mark the venue choice without ceremony
in-product.obstacle_local: Microcopy wants to instruct; I let it sit.

picks.text: Synthetix sits next to Hyperliquid in Infinex. Ten markets on Ethereum mainnet, USDT-settled, cross-margin on a CLOB. Two venues for perps, one account.
Synthetix perps in Infinex. Ten markets on Ethereum mainnet, USDT-settled, on a CLOB.
Synthetix · USDT on Ethereum · CLOB, cross-margin
